_comment: Per-deployment runtime configuration for the dispatch console (issue #14). Served as-is from the app origin and read on boot — edit it on the host to re-point a deployment WITHOUT rebuilding. Values here override the built-in defaults and any build-time VITE_ vars. Unknown keys are ignored; remove a key to fall back to its default. Note: rapidproToken is shipped to the browser exactly as a VITE_ var would be — keep this file behind the same access controls as the app, or proxy RapidPro server-side.
